original_image_tags: A typed FBI memorandum on official letterhead. The top left corner features the seal of the United States Department of Justice / Federal Bureau of Investigation.

elements.description: One circular official seal of the United States Department of Justice / Federal Bureau of Investigation located in the top left corner. Below the seal, the text 'In Reply, Please Refer to File No.' is visible.

The rest of the page consists of typed text on official letterhead, including headers ('UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE', 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION', 'Albuquerque, New Mexico', 'May 8, 1964'), a title ('UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECT', 'SOCORRO, NEW MEXICO', 'APRIL 24, 1964'), and body paragraphs describing an incident. There is a footer disclaimer in red text at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a single FBI seal in the top left corner, but Description B adds specific details about seal text, headers, and a red footer not mentioned in A without contradicting it.
